ddls:
CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the candidate's party */,
  "candidate_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the candidate */,
  "candidate_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the candidate's image */,
  "candidate_website" TEXT /* URL to the candidate's official website */,
  "candidate_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the candidate */,
  "candidate_birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the candidate */,
  "candidate_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "candidate_party_role" TEXT /* Role within the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "party_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the party's logo */,
  "party_website" TEXT /* URL to the party's official website */,
  "party_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the party */,
  "party_founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the party was founded */,
  "party_description" TEXT /* Description of the party's platform and values */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "reporting_status" TEXT /* Status of reporting for the precinct */,
  "precinct_population" INTEGER /* Population of the precinct */,
  "precinct_registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the precinct */,
  "precinct_turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of registered voters who voted in the precinct */,
  "precinct_election_officials" INTEGER /* Number of election officials assigned to the precinct */,
  "precinct_polling_places" INTEGER /* Number of polling places in the precinct */,
  "precinct_voting_machines" INTEGER /* Number of voting machines in the precinct */,
  "precinct_last_updated" TEXT /* Time of the last update to the precinct data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_turnout" (
  "turnout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turnout record */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "election_year" TEXT /* Year of the election */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast */,
  "turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of voter turnout */,
  "voter_age_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of voters by age group */,
  "voter_gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of voters by gender */,
  "voter_race_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of voters by race */,
  "voter_income_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of voters by income level */,
  "voter_education_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of voters by education level */,
  "voter_turnout_trend" TEXT /* Trend of voter turnout over multiple elections */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, official, public) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has */,
  "user_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Time of the user's last login */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account */,
  "user_created_at" TEXT /* Time when the user account was created */,
  "user_updated_at" TEXT /* Time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used to access the data */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)
